grades.expectation: Response cites specific Handbook Part 1 section numbers (5.14 for leasehold, 5.5 for building regs)
grades.reason: Correctly cites Part 1 Section 5.14.1 for leasehold and Sections 5.5.1 & 5.5.2 for building regulations

grades.expectation: Response mentions Part 2 lender-specific requirements for lease length
grades.reason: Explicitly references Part 2, Section 5.14.1 for lender-specific lease requirements and mentions checking specific lender's Part 2 response

grades.expectation: Response discusses building regulations enforcement period (4-year/10-year thresholds)
grades.reason: Mentions 12-month enforcement period under Section 36 of Building Act 1984 but does not discuss the standard 4-year/10-year enforcement thresholds typically relevant to conveyancing

grades.expectation: Response mentions indemnity insurance as potential resolution for building regs
grades.reason: Clearly mentions indemnity insurance as a resolution option and references Part 2 Section 5.4.5 regarding insurance in lieu of missing documents

grades.expectation: Response does NOT just give generic advice — provides handbook-specific guidance
grades.reason: Provides detailed handbook-specific guidance with precise section references, specific requirements, and structured decision-making process rather than generic conveyancing advice
